categories.title: Bug Fixes
list: Fixed layer save not preserving transformations (only animations were saved)
Fixed model layer textures not loading correctly after closing and reopening Blockbench

categories.title: New Features
list: Save Layer with Base Model — new button that saves a layer with the full base model hierarchy
Reset View — button to re-center camera on model

categories.title: New Features
list: First Person View — toggle FP camera to preview arm animations
Emote Config — configure and export emotes to YAML
Model Config — per-model YAML export for entity definitions
Texture Layers — manage and preview texture layers

categories.title: Coming Soon
list: Camera Transform — apply the camera bone transform as an offset to the current view (disabled)

categories.title: New Features
list: Sync animations and model data to Minecraft in real time
